enum_values.name: Planar
enum_values.summary: Planar mapping. Uses projection, origin, up and across vectors (not unitized).

enum_values.name: Cylindrical
enum_values.summary: Cylindrical mapping. Uses origin, up, across, height, radius, latitude start and stop.

enum_values.name: Spherical
enum_values.summary: Spherical mapping. Uses origin, up, across, radius, latitude/longitude start and stop.
